ranking: Backward remains the largest additive phase: 19.5877s rank-max in step 2.
MORI owner local VJP is the largest named step-2 sidecar bucket: 4.7992s rank-total max; combine_dx wait is 1.6149s.
C128 shared-KV query-recompute backward is the next large named bucket: 2.5873s rank-total max across the five C128 layers, median 32.32 ms/call.
The persistent microbatch wrapper/residual is 5.4047s and is outside the additive forward/loss/backward phase labels.
The old compact prepare_ops wall is solved for expert_loop recompute: prepare_ops is only 0.0015s rank-total max in exact step 2.
next_targets: Fuse compact owner-rank MoE training backward to attack wgrad, forward_recompute, xgrad, and owner-rank skew rather than route_pack/prepare_ops.
Continue sparse-attention backward rewrite, especially C4 support; C128 query_recompute still costs about 32 ms/call but materializes e2e.
Add broader attribution for the remaining backward-minus-sidecar wall and the 5.4s microbatch wrapper/residual bucket before chasing smaller kernel wins.
